warnings: Direct edges from factor (fac_investment) to goal (goal_growth) are not allowed by model topology rules. The model already transmits investment effects to the goal via intermediate outcomes and risks.

coaching.summary: Direct causal links from a controllable factor to a goal node would bypass necessary outcomes or risks, and are not permitted. If you want to strengthen the influence of Expansion Investment on reaching 800 Pro Customers, consider increasing its effect on intermediate nodes (e.g., out_revenue or risk_financial) instead.
